introBody: Your first delivery has been logged with Sol Sector dispatch. The United Space Consortium is extending a partnership offer to qualifying independent pilots. We are short on certified Venus-lane operators and your file matched the screening parameters.
Completion of the following work qualifies you for a permanent Earth orbital kiosk and a 2x payout multiplier on all Earth-issued contracts:
3) Install Heat Shield Lvl 1 — non-negotiable for inner-system work.
5) Complete one orbital mission targeting Venus.
Accept and your terminal will receive Consortium dispatch updates as you progress.

steps.subject: Step 1 — Shuttle EVA
flavor: Operator,
Take any shuttle EVA contract from a planetary spaceport. Repair work, satellite servicing, hardpoint inspection — any qualifying EVA file your terminal lists.
Submit the close-out and the Consortium will log the credit toward your certification.
— USC Operator Relations

steps.subject: Step 2 — Asteroid Operation
flavor: Operator,
Lander qualification next. Accept any asteroid contract, deploy the lander, complete the field objectives and exfil cleanly.
We are not looking for heroics. We are looking for a clean log.
— USC Operator Relations

steps.subject: Step 3 — Heat Shield Lvl 1
flavor: Operator,
Inner-system work without a Heat Shield is a closed coffin. Have your shuttle outfitted with Heat Shield Level 1 at any spaceport engineering bay.
Confirmation pings to your file the moment it is installed.
— USC Operator Relations

steps.subject: Step 4 — Venus Orbital Insertion
flavor: Operator,
Hold a stable Venus orbit. Confirm thermal limits are within the Heat Shield envelope. The Consortium will log your insertion the moment your transponder pings inside the lane.
Do not loaf. Establish orbit, acknowledge the chime, then proceed to your orbital mission task.
— USC Operator Relations

steps.subject: Step 5 — Venus Orbital Operation
flavor: Operator,
Final certification objective. Accept any planetary shuttle contract whose target is Venus and complete its orbital task in-lane.
Deliver the cargo at the giver and your file is closed in your favor.
— USC Operator Relations

completionBody: Certification logged. The United Space Consortium has unlocked a permanent operator kiosk for you in Earth orbit. Your transponder will be recognized by traffic control on inbound approach from anywhere in the system.
Per the partnership agreement, all Earth-issued contracts now pay at a 2x rate. We expect this incentive will keep you in the inner system for the foreseeable future.
